content.body:
- Add Node.js CLI with 4 commands: setup, init, update, status
  - setup: replaces sync.sh with better UX (symlinks agents/rules/skills)
  - init: interactive project onboarding (stack scan, manager selection,
    specialist scaffolding, CLAUDE.md generation, .gitignore setup)
  - update: fetch/pull core + re-sync + auto-migrate projects
  - status: show core and project state
- Stack scanner detects 20+ technologies and suggests specialists
- Specialist scaffolds use lazy hiring loop (playbook filled on first use)
- update command includes migration system for breaking changes
- init adds .claude/ to project .gitignore by default

- Rename Dev Manager → Engineer Manager across entire codebase (16 files)
  - agents/managers/dev.md → agents/managers/engineer.md
  - All references updated in rules, docs, RDDs, migration map, README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add CLI (v0.1.0) and rename Dev Manager → Engineer Manager
